name: Pet 'n Shape Chik 'n Retriever Roll Dog Treats
description: Treat your furry family member to a hide-free chew built for taste with Pet 'n Shape Chik 'n Retriever Roll Dog Treats! These naturally delicious treats are individually hand rolled and crafted with premium ingredients including real, high-quality chicken. Designed to give your pup more of what they want and less of what you don't, these chews are packed with gnaw-some flavor and don’t contain rawhide, preservatives or grains. Plus, they’re paw-fect for dogs of all breeds and sizes!
